title: Access to and use of buildings: research on demographic and ergonomic requirements
body: "This report and its appendices, produced by ARUP Consultants, summarises the research commissioned by government. The findings and recommendations do not represent government policy or guidance but form part of the technical review of the statutory guidance for accessibility in buildings in England given by Approved Document M.  This research investigates how well the built environment in England meets the needs of disabled people and those with long-term health conditions. The study combines literature reviews, qualitative insights, and experimental data to understand barriers, helpful features, and spatial requirements for accessibility. "
